linkedServices.name: ls_nyc311_http

properties.description: Starter linked service definition for the NYC Open Data 311 API endpoint used by the Milestone 11 raw landing contract.

linkedServices.notes: This repo-side JSON documents the linked service name and expected endpoint. Use a Socrata app token or request headers only if the final API contract requires them.

linkedServices.name: ls_adls_nyc311

properties.description: Starter ADLS Gen2 linked service definition for the Milestone 11 raw landing and downstream curated storage pattern.

linkedServices.notes: Replace the storage account placeholder and wire managed identity or Key Vault-backed authentication during deployment.

linkedServices.name: ls_databricks_nyc311

properties.description: Starter linked service definition for the Databricks workspace that receives the Milestone 11 bronze handoff.

linkedServices.notes: No token or secret is included. Final authentication and cluster policy decisions are intentionally left as deployment-time choices.
